component.name: Music Assistant Native
component.summary: A native KDE client for Music Assistant

description.p: Music Assistant Native is a native desktop client for Music Assistant, the open-source music library manager. It connects to your Music Assistant server over WebSocket and provides a Plasma-native interface for browsing your music library, controlling playback on any connected speaker, and managing your play queue.

ul.li: Browse your unified music library (artists, albums, tracks, playlists, radios)
Control playback on any Music Assistant player (Sonos, AirPlay, Chromecast, etc.)
Manage the play queue with shuffle, repeat, and drag-to-reorder
View now playing with album art and seek controls
Native KDE Plasma integration with Kirigami UI
